title: Faithful: PAERadialBlur param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 19.0 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAERadialBlur must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAERadialBlur to range extremes across hosts ['Blurs__Radial', 'Replicator-Clones__Combo_Spin'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=18.99 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAERadialBlur implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAERadialBlur` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Blurs__Radial", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 28.638, "ddb": 18.992}, {"host": "Blurs__Radial", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 28.516, "ddb": 19.029}, {"host": "Replicator-Clones__Combo_Spin", "param": "mix", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 18.246, "ddb": 22.908}, {"host": "Blurs__Radial", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.5, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 17.074, "ddb": 23.484}, {"host": "Blurs__Radial", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.5, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 15.152, "ddb": 24.521}, {"host": "Replicator-Clones__Combo_Spin", "param": "mix", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.5, "oracle_signal": 11.956, "ddb": 26.579}]
